languages.text: Прокричав молитву, зарковцы ринулись в бой. Стоя насмерть, они сдерживали натиск нечестивых машин, пока последняя капля крови не покинула их жилы. Потомку, членам его свиты и мне удалось взобраться на платформу, несущую нас в Музеон, но все отважные бойцы, без колебаний последовавшие за командиром, пали в неравном бою.
languages.translation_comment: Жартва архимилитанта, этот персонаж мертв навсегда
Жартва архимилитанта, этот персонаж мертв навсегда

languages.text: With shouted prayers, the Zarkovians rushed into battle. They held the unholy machines at bay, fighting until the last drops of blood left their veins. My scion, {mf|his|her} retinue, and myself were able to climb a platform that took us up to the Museion, but all the brave soldiers who had not hesitated to follow their commander had fallen in the unequal fight.
languages.original_text: Прокричав молитву, зарковцы ринулись в бой. Стоя насмерть, они сдерживали натиск нечестивых машин, пока последняя капля крови не покинула их жилы. Потомку, членам его свиты и мне удалось взобраться на платформу, несущую нас в Музеон, но все отважные бойцы, без колебаний последовавшие за командиром, пали в неравном бою.

traits.locale_text: With shouted prayers, the Zarkovians rushed into battle. They held the unholy machines at bay, fighting until the last drops of blood left their veins. My scion, {mf|his|her} retinue, and myself were able to climb a platform that took us up to the Museion, but all the brave soldiers who had not hesitated to follow their commander had fallen in the unequal fight.

With shouted prayers, the Zarkovians rushed into battle. They held the unholy machines at bay, fighting until the last drops of blood left their veins. My scion, {mf|his|her} retinue, and myself were able to climb a platform that took us up to the Museion, but all the brave soldiers who had not hesitated to follow their commander had fallen in the unequal fight.

With shouted prayers, the Zarkovians rushed into battle. They held the unholy machines at bay, fighting until the bitter end, while the shots of the Omnissiah's servants turned one core guardian after another to ash. The sphere was left without defenders, but all the brave fighters who had not hesitated to follow their commander had fallen in the unequal struggle.

My scion, {mf|his|her} retinue, and myself were able to climb a platform that took us up to the Museion, but all the brave soldiers who had not hesitated to follow their commander had fallen in the unequal fight.

With shouted prayers, the Zarkovians rushed into battle. They held the unholy machines at bay, fighting until the last drops of blood left their veins. My scion, {mf|his|her} retinue, and myself were able to climb a platform that took us up to the Museion, but all the brave soldiers who had not hesitated to follow their commander had fallen in the unequal fight.

languages.text: 扎尔科夫士兵高声祈祷着冲向战场。他们战至体内最后一滴血流尽，也要牵制住那些不洁机械。我的继承人、其随从，以及我本人成功登上了一座通往陈列馆的浮台。可所有那些毫不犹豫追随其指挥官的勇士们，都在这场力量悬殊的战斗中力战而亡。
languages.original_text: With shouted prayers, the Zarkovians rushed into battle. They held the unholy machines at bay, fighting until the last drops of blood left their veins. My scion, {mf|his|her} retinue, and myself were able to climb a platform that took us up to the Museion, but all the brave soldiers who had not hesitated to follow their commander had fallen in the unequal fight.

traits.locale_text: 扎尔科夫士兵高声祈祷着冲向战场。他们战至体内最后一滴血流尽，也要牵制住那些不洁机械。我的继承人、其随从，以及我本人成功登上了一座通往陈列馆的浮台。可所有那些毫不犹豫追随其指挥官的勇士们，都在这场力量悬殊的战斗中力战而亡。

languages.text: Vociferando plegarias, los zarkovianos entraron en acción. Contuvieron a las sacrílegas máquinas, luchando mientras quedara sangre en sus venas. Mi hereder{mf|o|a}, su séquito y yo pudimos subir a una plataforma que nos llevaría hasta el Museion, pero todos los valientes que habían acompañado fielmente a su comandante cayeron en la desigual lucha.
languages.original_text: With shouted prayers, the Zarkovians rushed into battle. They held the unholy machines at bay, fighting until the last drops of blood left their veins. My scion, {mf|his|her} retinue, and myself were able to climb a platform that took us up to the Museion, but all the brave soldiers who had not hesitated to follow their commander had fallen in the unequal fight.

traits.locale_text: Vociferando plegarias, los zarkovianos entraron en acción. Contuvieron a las sacrílegas máquinas, luchando mientras quedara sangre en sus venas. Mi hereder{mf|o|a}, su séquito y yo pudimos subir a una plataforma que nos llevaría hasta el Museion, pero todos los valientes que habían acompañado fielmente a su comandante cayeron en la desigual lucha.

languages.text: Hurlant leurs prières, les Zarkoviens foncèrent tête baissée dans la bataille. Ils empêchèrent les machines impies d'approcher, luttant jusqu'à leur dernière goutte de sang. Mon {mf|héritier|héritière}, son entourage et moi-même parvînmes à monter sur une plateforme qui nous mena jusqu'au Muséion, abandonnant tous les courageux soldats qui n'avaient pas hésité à suivre leur {mf|commandant|commandante} dans la bataille et qui avaient péri dans cet affrontement inégal.
languages.original_text: With shouted prayers, the Zarkovians rushed into battle. They held the unholy machines at bay, fighting until the last drops of blood left their veins. My scion, {mf|his|her} retinue, and myself were able to climb a platform that took us up to the Museion, but all the brave soldiers who had not hesitated to follow their commander had fallen in the unequal fight.

traits.locale_text: Hurlant leurs prières, les Zarkoviens foncèrent tête baissée dans la bataille. Ils empêchèrent les machines impies d'approcher, luttant jusqu'à leur dernière goutte de sang. Mon {mf|héritier|héritière}, son entourage et moi-même parvînmes à monter sur une plateforme qui nous mena jusqu'au Muséion, abandonnant tous les courageux soldats qui n'avaient pas hésité à suivre leur {mf|commandant|commandante} dans la bataille et qui avaient péri dans cet affrontement inégal.

languages.text: Zarkovlular, attıkları naralarla savaşa atıldı. Kanlarının son damlası damarlarını terk edene dek savaşarak o iğrenç makineleri uzak tuttular. Vârisim, onun maiyeti ve ben bizi Museion'a çıkaran bir platforma tırmanabildik. Ancak komutanlarını takip etmekte tereddüt etmeyen o cesur askerlerin hepsi, adil olmayan savaşta yitti.
languages.original_text: With shouted prayers, the Zarkovians rushed into battle. They held the unholy machines at bay, fighting until the last drops of blood left their veins. My scion, {mf|his|her} retinue, and myself were able to climb a platform that took us up to the Museion, but all the brave soldiers who had not hesitated to follow their commander had fallen in the unequal fight.

traits.locale_text: Zarkovlular, attıkları naralarla savaşa atıldı. Kanlarının son damlası damarlarını terk edene dek savaşarak o iğrenç makineleri uzak tuttular. Vârisim, onun maiyeti ve ben bizi Museion'a çıkaran bir platforma tırmanabildik. Ancak komutanlarını takip etmekte tereddüt etmeyen o cesur askerlerin hepsi, adil olmayan savaşta yitti.

languages.text: Gebete brüllend stürzten sich die Zarkovianer in die Schlacht. Sie hielten die unheiligen Maschinen in Schach und kämpften bis zum letzten Tropfen Blut. {mf|Mein Erbe, sein|Meine Erbin, ihr} Gefolge und ich konnten auf eine Plattform klettern, die uns in das Museion brachte, aber all die tapferen Soldaten, die nicht gezögert hatten, ihrem Commander zu folgen, waren in der ungleichen Schlacht gefallen.
languages.original_text: With shouted prayers, the Zarkovians rushed into battle. They held the unholy machines at bay, fighting until the last drops of blood left their veins. My scion, {mf|his|her} retinue, and myself were able to climb a platform that took us up to the Museion, but all the brave soldiers who had not hesitated to follow their commander had fallen in the unequal fight.

traits.locale_text: Gebete brüllend stürzten sich die Zarkovianer in die Schlacht. Sie hielten die unheiligen Maschinen in Schach und kämpften bis zum letzten Tropfen Blut. {mf|Mein Erbe, sein|Meine Erbin, ihr} Gefolge und ich konnten auf eine Plattform klettern, die uns in das Museion brachte, aber all die tapferen Soldaten, die nicht gezögert hatten, ihrem Commander zu folgen, waren in der ungleichen Schlacht gefallen.

languages.text: ザルコビアンたちは、叫びながら祈りを捧げ、戦場へと突入した。彼らは聖なる機械を撃退し、最後まで戦い続けた。一方、オムニシアスのしもべの銃弾は、コア・ガーディアンを次々と灰に変えていった。球体には守る者がいなくなったが、指揮官に従って躊躇なく戦場に飛び込んだ勇敢な戦士たちは、不平等な戦いで全て倒れてしまった。
languages.original_text: With shouted prayers, the Zarkovians rushed into battle. They held the unholy machines at bay, fighting until the bitter end, while the shots of the Omnissiah's servants turned one core guardian after another to ash. The sphere was left without defenders, but all the brave fighters who had not hesitated to follow their commander had fallen in the unequal struggle.

traits.locale_text: ザルコビアンたちは、叫びながら祈りを捧げ、戦場へと突入した。彼らは聖なる機械を撃退し、最後まで戦い続けた。一方、オムニシアスのしもべの銃弾は、コア・ガーディアンを次々と灰に変えていった。球体には守る者がいなくなったが、指揮官に従って躊躇なく戦場に飛び込んだ勇敢な戦士たちは、不平等な戦いで全て倒れてしまった。
